summary: Horizontal video, a NewsNation 'Border Report' live segment with a reporter standing at the border wall in Del Rio, TX plus B-roll from Eagle Pass, reporting March migrant arrests as the lowest in decades and quoting veteran CBP agents on morale. It is a TV news package with no music.
notable_text: BORDER REPORT; MARCH MIGRANT ARRESTS: LOWEST IN DECADES; DEL RIO, TX; EAGLE PASS, TX; NEWS NATION
